name: CBRE Group, Inc.
focus: World's largest commercial real estate services and investment firm, specializing in leasing, property management, valuation, and investment sales.

name: Prologis, Inc.
focus: One of the world's largest owners of logistics facilities, industrial warehouses, and supply chain real estate.

name: Jones Lang LaSalle (JLL)
focus: Global commercial real estate and investment management company operating in more than 80 countries.

name: Cushman & Wakefield
focus: Major global commercial real estate brokerage, corporate occupier solutions, and property management firm.

name: Colliers
focus: Global commercial real estate services, investment management, and professional advisory services.

name: Brookfield Asset Management
focus: Owns and manages a massive portfolio of office buildings, logistics facilities, retail centers, and multifamily properties worldwide.

name: Simon Property Group
focus: Premier real estate investment trust and a major owner of premier shopping malls, dining, entertainment, and mixed-use retail properties.

name: China Vanke
focus: One of China's largest residential property developers and urban development service providers.

name: Country Garden
focus: Large-scale property development enterprise specializing in residential communities and mixed-use property development.

name: CapitaLand
focus: One of Asia's largest diversified real estate groups that develops and manages residential, commercial, retail, lodging, and industrial properties globally.

name: DLF Limited
focus: One of the largest commercial and residential real estate developers in India, known for creating major business districts and luxury housing.

name: Godrej Properties
focus: Leading developer bringing the Godrej Group philosophy of innovation, sustainability, and excellence to residential and commercial projects.

name: Prestige Group
focus: Major diversified developer with a massive footprint in residential, commercial, retail, leisure, and hospitality segments.

name: Brigade Group
focus: Leading property developer specializing in residential, commercial, retail, and hospitality sectors across South India.

name: Sobha Limited
focus: Real estate development and construction company famous for its backward integration model and high-quality residential townships.

name: Lodha Group (Macrotech Developers)
focus: Premium residential and commercial real estate developer, renowned for building landmark high-rises and luxury estates.
